title: A new dawn in awnings and blinds
description: BUSINESS NEWS - George welcomes a bright new...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - George welcomes a bright new star in the world of awnings and blinds - Blind Brilliance. This newly transformed business carries forward the heritage of its predecessor, the beloved Awnings and Blinds - a company known for the exceptional service and quality it has provided for more than 30 years.


> Following the closure of the landmark Awnings and Blinds, Jan Louw and Dolf Groenewald decided to continue the legacy under a new name and new branding.


Blind Brilliance keeps the trusted values and high standards of Awnings and Blinds, and with over eight years of experience as an employee at the former company, Jan brings a wealth of knowledge and passion to his new venture.

Joining Jan is a team of seasoned professionals, some of whom boast over 20 years of experience in the field.

While Blind Brilliance introduces a new identity, it stays deeply rooted in the core principles customers have come to trust.

"This transformation is not just about a new name and look - it's about enhancing our offerings and still serving our community.

"We want to build on the strong foundation of Awnings and Blinds, embracing innovation and staying true to the quality and service our customers expect. We are excited about this new journey and look forward to serving our community like we always have. We might be dealing in blinds, but we are always working with people," says Jan.

They offer blinds, shutters, security doors and burglar bars, louvre roofs, curtaining, folding doors, repairs and more! Blind Brilliance can be found at the 4th Street Mall (big Pick n Pay) on Knysna Road.

Give them a call on 044 874 7154, or send an email to [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
